guide_title: National Donut Day: Free Donut Stops
manual_intro: National Donut Day lands on Friday 5 June 2026. These are verified free-donut stops with a real outlet mapped for this city or nearby metro area. Offers are for 5 June 2026 only, may be while stocks last, and some require the brand app or loyalty scan. Check the linked brand terms before travelling.
place_description: Nearest verified Donut King outlet for Wollongong users. Free Hot Cinnamon Donut on Friday 5 June 2026 at participating stores, while stocks last.
